outputs.description: The `id` field is a unique identifier for the vulnerability entry. OSV.VulnerabilityList.vulns.published The RFC3339 timestamp indicating when this entry was published.
outputs.name: OSV.VulnerabilityList.vulns.id

outputs.description: The RFC3339 timestamp indicating when this entry was last modified. OSV.VulnerabilityList.vulns.withdrawn The RFC3339 timestamp indicating when this entry is considered to be withdrawn.
outputs.name: OSV.VulnerabilityList.vulns.modified

outputs.description: One line human readable summary for the vulnerability. It is recommended to keep this under 120 characters. OSV.VulnerabilityList.vulns.details Any additional human readable details for the vulnerability.
outputs.name: OSV.VulnerabilityList.vulns.summary

outputs.description: Applicable if type is GIT. The publicly accessible URL of the repo that can be directly passed to clone commands. OSV.VulnerabilityList.vulns.affected.ranges.events.introduced The earliest version/commit where this vulnerability was introduced in.
outputs.name: OSV.VulnerabilityList.vulns.affected.ranges.repo

outputs.description: The version/commit that this vulnerability was fixed in. OSV.VulnerabilityList.vulns.affected.ranges.events.limit The limit to apply to the range.
outputs.name: OSV.VulnerabilityList.vulns.affected.ranges.events.fixed

outputs.description: Reference URL for more details. Edit this page Report an Issue
outputs.name: OSV.VulnerabilityList.vulns.references.url
